name: Intel Core i5 14600K 14th Gen Processor
description: Intel Core i5 14600K 14th Gen Processor What is Intel Core i5 14600K 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan? Intel Core i5 14600K 14th Gen Processor price in Pakistan is Rs.75,000. This unlocked CPU features a hybrid design with 14 cores (6 Performance + 8 Efficient) and 20 threads, boosting up to around 5.3 GHz for smooth gaming and multitasking performance.
